items.text: Taurus rising. venus 4h leo. sat 3h cancer. nn 8h sag. been going through problems with health, work, job, money, gf. dreams crazy wealth, freedom, time, good people, health, more time to work out, level up psychically and spiritually

Taurus rising. Venus in Gemini 2nd house. Sagittarius Saturn in the 8th house. North node in Pisces in the 11th house. I would like to feel secure within my relationships of all kinds. I feel betrayed by close relationships. My mom is a huge part of my life. She has always been there for me. I’ve had a fallouts with many many family members from my husbands side as well as my side. I would like to have my own business if my own creative creations. I feel like I bring karma to those who have wronged me and everyone around them who won’t stand up for the right thing. I trigger their demons with boundaries and consistency but also with patience for them to change. If they don’t change I walk away and never or hardly ever return.
Curious what ur thinking about/putting together

Hi! Been put through the fucking wringer. I have Leo Venus 5th, NN cancer 3rd house, and Saturn Gemini 2nd house. I want to start a nonprofit, be a writer, create community gardens, build community, share my art, and to have a community farm that functions as a third space. I feel I’ve attracted lessons on love and connection as well as big fat lessons about money, and fears.

Venus is in Scorpio in my seventh house north nodeis in Leo my fourth house. Saturn is in my first house Taurus rising, I just want to be a successful woman with a beautiful family, I want to build an empire with my husband

Ok I’m technically an Aries rising, but it’s at 28°, so my chart is really set up like a Taurus rising. I have a Taurus Saturn in 1h, Leo Venus in my 4h which is conjunct my Leo nn in my 5h. Pair all that with an 8H Pluto and that explains why is been thru hell since like 2019 fr 😀

Taurus Rising here with my North node in 1st/Taurus, Venus in 8th/Sagittarius, and Saturn is in my 3rd/Cancer. Lately I’m really struggling with relationships, not just romantic but platonic as well. It’s hard to maintain a stable relationship with anyone. I’ve tried dating a few people but they’ve been really either really dry or have their own issues to resolve before they’re ready for a relationship. As for friendships, I don’t have many. My friends tend to vent to me a lot, sometimes without even asking for permission so it’s very draining at times because most of the time I just want a lighthearted conversation with someone to distract myself from my own problems. It’s also tough because I don’t feel like I have anyone I can rely on. Whenever I open up, my friends would either brush it aside or make it about them. (Though they’re just relating to my issues with theirs as a way to connect but it always ends up me comforting them.) Frankly I’m slowly giving up on finding a partner even if I want one because the dating scene is just grim right now. I’m trying to be independent, which could also be encouraged with my 8th house placements. Currently I’m working towards on finding a job and moving abroad for safety reasons but given how the job market and immigration situation are, it feels hopeless. I also have a T square if that helps you.

Venus in Gemini 2nd House, North Node in Libra 6th, currently in my Saturn Return in Aries 12th House. This one’s personal.
I grew up with nothing stable. No money, no safety net. So I trained myself to expect things to fail before they even start. It’s easier to brace for the worst than to hope and get let down again. Never went to university because school made me feel stupid, even though deep down I knew I wasn’t. Self doubt won that fight. So I took a retail job that was never supposed to last and stayed 9 years.
I climbed the ladder. Got to management. And then it hit me, my whole sense of worth was tied to that job and that paycheck, which wasn’t even much. I hated it. But it was familiar, and familiar felt safe.

Taurus rising Venus in sag in the 7th north node in Gemini in the 1st and Saturn in the 2nd….i want a loft lmasososo and to make my music peace and just a stable income if i can be private with my boo cool or if i could be a BIG HUGE STAR id love that too LMAO. I’ve lost friends, my ex who I was dating for 3 years moved on in 2 weeks, my mom had to go to court and needs money from me and I’m moving out finally for the first time in my life , I’m 23 so I’m in a 12th house year and personal 9 year so IM LOSING ALOT and I’m dying. But it’s for the better I believe and hope and pray LMAO… and yea I attract avoidants

Taurus rising here! libra venus in the 6th house, aquarius saturn in the 9th house, capricorn north node in the 9th house. what i’m going through are expansions of consciousness and greater pattern recognition / synchronicities. moving back home with my family at the end of the month which brings up childhood trauma around spirituality/religion and my identity related to gender, sexuality, and external familial/community expectations. ive deconstructed the faith i was raised in without disclosing that to my family as i prepare to live with them again. been in two long term relationships and they tend to have themes around power dynamics and control and emotional intensity (scorpio 7th house obvi)

I'm a Scorp w/Taurus rising, NN in Taurus in the 1st. Saturn in Scorp in 7th (I also have my sun snd pluto here 😳). Sag venus in 8th. Lots of conjunctions. I'm only admitting this because I'm anonymous, but I want my ex back. There was no closure from him, and it hurt and still hurts. I don't think I'll ever love or like anyone as much again. I attract responsibility. My sun conjuncts saturn, so maybe that's why.

Venus 10h, NN 8h, Saturn 10h. I want to move to another country, live on the beach or in a large warm city, run a clothing company or interior design firm. I think im constantly forced to detach and be reminded that nothing is permanent. I hate that.

Taurus rising cap sun/stellium Venus sag in 8th Saturn cap 9th nn Pisces 11th I literally just want to live like a hobbit have a home with a salon in it and live close to a small downtown I feel like I have to work harder than anyone I’m not gonna get to you into it, but I’ve experienced family abuse dated abusers I am extremely lucky to be married to my best friend and that has been wonderful I have experienced several family deaths over the years. I’ve had to pretty much be self-sufficient since 18. I would move somewhere and think that this is it and then I would have to relocate. I love my career, but it’s also been hell and I’ve learned over the years to keep to myself. I don’t trust a lot of people. I have friends that I trust. I feel like I am constantly learning and giving information and I used to dream about traveling the world and moving to a different country, but that dream died a long time ago

Taurus Rising going through what can only be described as an ego death- Leo Venus 4H, Aquarius North Node 10H, Capricorn Saturn 10H. My dream is to live at the intersection of sociology and comedy where people don’t feel alone, but also can laugh at our shared experiences. Oh and financial freedom!
Can’t wait to hear about what you discover and I’d be happy to help you synthesize insights (it is my profession after all!)

Venus taurus, north node scorpio 7th, Saturn Pisces 11th. Dreams lol to have a stable, well paying freaking job. I like to help, I want to help others around me but its kinda difficult at the moment....I think im attracting discomfort. I literally cant be frivolous my jobs dont last. Even when i think they will something happens they dont 🙃

losing everyone around me like literally everyone, parents, friends, boyfriends right now my circle is TWO people who both live in different places, can’t work, so much disruption in my living situation and also starvation (but that particular struggle is in the past and am strong in the recovery phase atp) so the way you hit every single thing on the head 💀 venus is in rx in leo in my 4H (it’s conjunct my Jupiter and mercury and squares my rising) NN is in capricorn in the 9H (also rx conjunct my rx neptune, Lilith, and juno while trine/sextiling my 12H taurus moon and 6H scorpio pluto) and my saturn is also in the 9H but in aquarius (also retrograde, conjunct my MC and opposing my chiron) 💀
Venus in Scorpio north node in Leo Saturn in Aquarius

Venus 6th, north node 10th, Saturn 9th… dream is to make money doing what I love, health, friends, to feel good about myself. I feel like I’m always learning to work with what I have, go where I’m already wanted and loved>> basically stop with the grass is greener. Been going through it the last 10 years with multiple very invasive emergency surgeries and health issues.

taurus rising. aquarius stellium in the 10th house (moon, venus, Mars, Saturn, Lilith). north node is Capricorn. my dream is to just have money and unlimited resources to help my friends and family. maybe live in a wildflower field away from society with my husband and son and a bunch of animals lol I attract lessons that teach me to never get too comfortable and to always expect the unexpected. always waiting for the other shoe to drop.

Venus in Pisces in the 11th house. North Node in Leo in the 4th house and Saturn in Aries in the 12th house. Just started my own small business - I want to be financially free to own my own home and land to live off of. I feel like I need community but never seem to have it and always end up being very independent and self reliant instead

venus in scorpio, north node in leo, saturn in aries. i just want a slow life with the person i love the most (i am single now unfortunately what i thought was the loml dipped) i want chickens and a cozy home and kids but i also wanna be a therapist or counselor and am trying to get into grad school
Venus, 1 house. North node, Capricorn 9, Saturn , Aquarius 10

Venus 12th in Aries, north node 8th sag, Saturn 10th Aquarius with my sun. My dream is to travel often between mine and my loved one’s homes across the globe & to create a beautiful family. I feel I’ve attracted demons and angels into my life. 💝 themes of life and death, and bright shining harmony in between

Virgo Venus in 5th , Aquarius Saturn in 10th, Capricorn North Node. I just want to travel and be free. I don’t think I’m meant to do anything fast. My life goes to shambles every time I try to hard. I seem to attract people who need security. I feel like I attract problems to solve. Usually not my own.

Taurus Rising here who is absolutely going through it. Aries Venus in the 12th house, Libra North Node in 6th, Pisces Saturn in the 11th house. My dream is to have friends and community, and lasting relationships. I feel like I attract other people who want sex or superficial relationships from me, but are not interested in deeper connections.

3 years ago ended a 12 year relationship, lost my mom and befriend to death within 1 year, lost friends to mental illness. Grew up malnourished. Venus in 12th (Aries), Saturn in 8th (Sagittarius), north node in 11th (Pisces). Dreams- peace, resources, my own corner of the world, passionate and safe love. What I attract- people who need someone to hold space for them, I think I’m lucky but in a way that is annoying… for example something bad happens to me and it resolves itself in the final hour.

Venus in Scorpio (7th House), NN in Sag (8th House), Saturn in Aquarius (10th House) but in Placidus, my NN is in the 7th House and my Saturn is in 11th. My ultimate dream in life is to be free. The lessons I’ve attracted are too many to count, but some include: learning to go with the flow because things seems to not work out for me when I have a strong plan, learning to transmute pain (turning it into a positive), always be ready to transform because the version I am today will most definitely be different next year or even in a couple months time and that many elements of my life just aren’t suppose to be conventional. Life has always felt like a balancing act for me, especially since I graduated from university which was a very long time ago, but I’m more than ready to experience all the good life has to offer me.
venus scopio 7th house, north node scorpio 7th house, saturn pisces 11th house and i’ve been thru ANYTHING you could imagine 😭

Venus in Aquarius- 11th house, N Node in Scorpio- 7th house, Saturn in Pisces- 11th house…my dreams are to genuinely be surrounded self sufficient from my own garden, to have zero pressure to “work” and to exist in my own bubble of happiness, peace, and creativity. Healthy kids and a happy Marriage would be a bonus.

Taurus 1H rising, Venus and Mercury, Virgo 5H NN, Moon, mars and Lilith, Aries 12H sun and Saturn. I’ve been going through it with career and I had an injury this past month and can’t work 😩 i just want to have fun, eat and travel in beautiful places. Hmm I feel like I attract secretive men lol
All three in the fifth house - Virgo 😳

the person I thought I was going to marry broke up with me in november out of nowhere and i’ve been going through it since then. aries venus retrograde squares at 0° my north node in cancer 2nd house. saturn taurus is in my 12th, exactly conjunct my 28° taurus rising
venus in the 2nd saturn in the 11th north node in the 6th

Venus is in my 5th house (I’m a 29th degree Taurus rising) and north node sag 7th/8th house if you’re looking at placidus charts and Saturn is in my 10th house in Aquarius. I definitely just dream of stability in career and being able to live comfortably lol

Venus in Aquarius (10th House). North Node in Capricorn (9th House). Saturn in Aquarius (10th House). I’ve been going through major career changes, becoming more visible on social media, letting go of old friendships, and becoming comfortable with solitude. My beliefs and priorities have completely shifted. I’m focused on consistency, the gym, building my fishing community, and living more authentically instead of trying to fit in. My ultimate goal is to buy land, live more self-sufficiently, and build a peaceful life where I can truly be myself.

This is foot on the ground journalism. I needed it. Follow this for us and ill follow. Im going through this and im intermediate in astrology. Venus in libra 6h, nnode sag in 8h, aquarius saturn in the 10h. Dreams: art based scholar. What havr i attracted: a lot of oppurtonity but no sense of security and sustainability, cant even reciprocate romantic feelings anymore. If u need help with interpretation and pattern recognition im here. My credentials: phd and autism

I'm not answering for myself but I'm speaking for my boyfriend who doesn't have TikTok anymore but he has a Sag 8th house stellium like you. I hope this is still okay for you. His Venus is not in Scorpio but Capricorn 9th house, North node in the 6th in Libra, and Saturn in Pisces in the 11th house.
yep that’s me!! gone through all that. taurus rising. venus is in 9th house, NN in 6th, saturn in 11th. dream is to build a company that’s successful

Venus in Aries in the 12th house, North Node in Capricorn in the 9th house, Saturn in Aquarius in the 10th house. This year, my parents sold my childhood home, four family pets ( my own, my parents, or my mother-in-law‘s that lived with my husband and I for a few years) have all passed within three months of each other, been feeling very burnt out. When it comes to dreams, I just want to have done well enough to take care of me and mine and get to a point of being able to build a longer table.

I have Venus in the fourth house . North node first house . Saturn in third house . Dreams about exes also being trapped in school or being yelled at in school. Also dealing with my mom’s girlfriend who struggles with nicotine addiction and taking her to the hospital in my dreams which has affected me a lot . So mainly school past relationships, and dealing with people that struggle with addictions.

Venus-Gemini 2h, NN-Leo 5h, Saturn-Virgo 6h. I’ve had a lot of loss through death or relationship endings. In the last 1-2 yrs, my finances have taken a big hit. My dream is to feel supported and not alone. I want a lasting relationship and security in all areas of my life.

Venus in Scorpio w Pluto, north node in cap in 9th house, Saturn in 10th in aqua. Lost my boyfriend and best friend/situationship since 2019. Dreams to just life a simple life living off the land, travel all over the world connecting w different people, learn about different cultures and religions

so interesting would love to hear more! Venus-Aries 12th, N.Node-Aquarius 10th, Saturn-Gemini(0 deg.) 1st house Placidus/ 2nd house whole. Lost my husband at young age, my dad. Lifelong health etc. challenges, day to day tough. think I have eliminated all the things I shouldn’t be doing in life!🤪

@Amy Smith-Dupree | REALTOR: Hey girl! Taurus rising Venus is Aquarius in the 10th house, north node in Gemini in 2nd house, Saturn in 7th in Scorpio. I just want to be happy. I’m an entrepreneur but had to take a corporate job to make ends meet. I have always been able to attract money or vocational opportunities but my interpersonal relationships suck. Hope this helps
Venus is libra in the 6th , Saturn in Cancer in the 3rd ,North Node in the 1st in Taurus .. dreams .. to live comfortably on the countryside holistically preferably with my love and pets
🙋🏼‍♀️Venus 10h Aquarius, Saturn 10H Sag, NN Aries in 12H — want to not work so hard and often! Very good at manifesting what I call in otherwise

venus aries 12th house; north node uranus 10th house; saturn capricorn 9th house. career and health wise, i’ve been goin throughhh it. the dream would be to make a living wage as an artist (able to live comfortably, slowly and just create). i feel like i attract opportunities to grow…as in i don’t often seek out things that seem challenging/impossible, but if presented the option, i take it and often learn lessons that way (i’m a Manifesting-Generator). also in recent years have significantly expanded my inner world/spirituality. pls let us know what you find!! 🩵
items.author_full_name: s a r a 🎠 m a r i e

items.text: I have Aries venus(12th h), Taurus saturn(1st h), Cancer NN (3rd h). and I mean if I could do anything right now I would like to start a brand new life alone in a new faraway town or country, with a new job(maybe teaching dance?) and be able to actually build and sustain a relationship and financial security. what did I attract in life? honestly a repeated cycle of death of meaning in every part of life, relationships, career, to the point that it feels like making sand castles near the sea

Aquarius Venus 11th house. Capricorn Saturn and north node in the 10th house. I am feeling relief right now but I have literally been hanging on by a thread. My dream is to structure my life so I can do whatever I want outside of capitalism and help build a new world alongside my community. My dream is to help people set themselves free. I am a Capricorn sun/stellium. Every day is just an onslaught of lessons in devotion and confidence.

Venus in 10th. Saturn in the 12th. North node in 5th house. My dreams would be to travel and experience as much of nature as I can. I wish I could be outside all day every day. I feel like I attract people that want my love but do not love me back.
